seoTitle: Narrabri vs Narran Lake — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Narrabri and Narran Lake. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Narrabri vs Narran Lake: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Narrabri and Narran Lake.
heading: Narrabri vs Narran Lake — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Narrabri, New South Wales and Narran Lake, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Narran Lake has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Narrabri (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Narrabri or Narran Lake safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Narrabri has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Narran Lake scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Narrabri scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Narran Lake scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Narrabri or Narran Lake?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Narran Lake has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
